#  Publish Personal Drawing Markups 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Published markups can be edited or deleted. Any changes to these markups will automatically be visible to anyone with access to the drawing.
    * 'Standard' users can only edit personal and published markups that they've created.
    * Published markups can only be deleted by users with 'Admin' level permissions on the Drawings tool unless [granted specific permissions to delete published markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/allow-users-to-delete-published-markups).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Open** next to the drawing you want to mark up.   
_Tip!_ If you already added markups that you want to publish, skip to step 5.
  3. Click the **Markup** icon.   
![Markup In The Drawing Toolbar](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/690eed7f1b889b05c32e8c1fa29218f8/97849b368c8d5070d7b9f4577cc64966/markup-in-the-drawing-toolbar.jpg?fm=webp&h=40)
  4. Select the markups that you want to publish using one of the following tools from the markup toolbar:  
![Markup Select Tools](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5aabc97732c2a6fd01c87b6dc771fc8a/f275f314cf263ce63144aae2866cf862/markup-select-tools.png?fm=webp)
     * Use the **Select** tool to click a markup to select.
     * Use the **Multi-Select** tool to draw a rectangle to select multiple markups.
     * Use the **Lasso** tool to draw a shape around the markups you want to select.
  5. With the markups selected, click **Publish**.  
This will allow the selected markups to be seen by everyone with access to this drawing.  
![2024 12 13 Publish Markup](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3d3c40b2b3ca81cb6bff00a440dd81ee/0fbbc2c6fd2f3b8baaa972a74b41ad1e/2024-12-13-publish-markup.png?fm=webp&h=24)


## See Also
  * [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)
  * [Mark Up a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing)
  * [Add Observations to a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/add-observations-to-a-drawing)
title: Publish Personal Drawing Markups
description: How to publish drawing markups using Procore's Drawings tool.
